name: droplet-workspace
description: Provision a DigitalOcean droplet and add it as a Codex remote SSH workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Provision a DigitalOcean droplet as a Codex remote SSH workspace.
interface.longDescription: Creates a DigitalOcean Codex droplet. Authenticates via OAuth MCP, uploads SSH key via MCP, creates and polls droplet via MCP, then configures local SSH access.
